text:
1. Determine time difference: Europe/Athens is UTC +2, Asia/Singapore is UTC +8, so the time difference is 8 - 2 = 6 hours.
2. Add the time difference to the given time: 18:00 + 6 hours = 00:00 (next day).
3. Adjust the date: Since the time goes past midnight, the date becomes July 22, 1572.
FINAL_ANSWER: 00:00 on July 22, 1572
